text:
(1) The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same unless such movement can be made with safety and without interfering with other traffic.

(2) The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same upon any shoulder or roadway of any limited access facility.

(3) A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.1985 — Limitations on backing

(1) The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same unless such movement can be made with safety and without interfering with other traffic.

(2) The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same upon any shoulder or roadway of any limited access facility.

(3) A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.

subsections.text: The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same unless such movement can be made with safety and without interfering with other traffic.
The driver of a vehicle shall not back the same upon any shoulder or roadway of any limited access facility.
A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.
